title: Implement Clone method in Cloneable classes
description: Cloneable is a marker interface that defines the contract of the Object.clone method, but the class implementing Cloneable should override the Object.clone method to create a consistent copy of the instance. This rule checks if the Cloneable classes do not override the Object.clone method.
recommendation: Override the Object.clone method in the Cloneable classes.
impact: Violating the contract for Cloneable can lead to inconsistent copies of objects.

checks.message: Rule: Implement Clone method in Cloneable classes
